title: Semis Spotlight: PSG and Bayern Battle for Wembley Glory
excerpt: Can PSG finally overcome their Bavarian bogey team? The Parisians host Bayern Munich tonight in a high-stakes Champions League semi-final clash that promises tactical brilliance and explosive attacking football.
author: OnixWhite

title: David vs Dynasty: Southampton FC Challenge Manchester City FC’s Empire
excerpt: Erling Haaland’s hat-trick powered Manchester City to a 3-0 win over Southampton, strengthening their grip on the Premier League title race with a dominant display at St Mary’s.
author: Adityan Nair

title: The Return of the King: Messi Orchestrates Revenge in New England
excerpt: Lionel Messi inspired Inter Miami to a comeback win over New England Revolution, delivering another decisive performance in a thrilling MLS encounter.
author: Adityan Nair

title: Barcelona Edge Getafe in Tactical Battle as Lewandowski Makes the Difference in La Liga Clash
excerpt: Robert Lewandowski’s decisive goal earned Barcelona a narrow win over Getafe, keeping their La Liga title hopes alive after a tense and physical encounter.
author: OnixWhite

title: Bellingham brilliance powers Real Madrid to dominant 3-0 win over Alavés, tightening grip on title race
excerpt: Jude Bellingham led Real Madrid to a 3-0 win over Alavés, helping Los Blancos strengthen their grip on the La Liga title race with a composed performance at the Bernabéu.
author: OnixWhite

title: Liverpool edge Everton in fiery Merseyside Derby as Salah seals crucial 2-1 victory
excerpt: Mohamed Salah inspired Liverpool to a 2-1 Merseyside Derby victory over Everton, delivering a decisive moment in a fiercely contested clash at Goodison Park.
author: OnixWhite

title: Kane hat-trick powers Bayern past Stuttgart in dominant Bundesliga display
excerpt: Harry Kane’s hat-trick inspired Bayern Munich to a 3-1 victory over Stuttgart, strengthening their Bundesliga title push with a composed and clinical performance at the Allianz Arena.
author: OnixWhite

title: Endrick masterclass stuns PSG as Lyon secure huge 2-1 Ligue 1 victory in Paris
excerpt: Endrick starred with a goal and assist as Lyon stunned PSG 2-1 at Parc des Princes, overcoming a missed PSG penalty and late Kvaratskhelia strike to shake up the Ligue 1 title race.
author: OnixWhite

title: Haaland strikes decisive blow as Man City defeat Arsenal 2-1 in title race thriller
excerpt: Erling Haaland’s 65th-minute strike secured a 2-1 win for Manchester City over Arsenal, with Rayan Cherki’s brilliance and a costly Donnarumma error shaping a pivotal twist in the Premier League title race.
author: OnixWhite

title: Penalty shootout drama crowns Real Sociedad champions after 2-2 thriller vs Atlético
excerpt: Real Sociedad defeated Atlético Madrid 4-3 on penalties after a dramatic 2-2 draw, with Unai Marrero’s heroics and Barrenetxea’s 15-second opener defining a thrilling 2026 Copa del Rey final.
author: OnixWhite

title: Defensive resilience fires Arsenal into Champions League semi-finals after gritty stalemate vs Sporting
excerpt: Arsenal reached the Champions League semi-finals after a tense 0-0 draw against Sporting, with Kai Havertz’s first-leg winner proving decisive in a disciplined performance at the Emirates.
author: OnixWhite

title: Ousmane Dembélé double silences Anfield as PSG eliminate Liverpool from Champions League
excerpt: Ousmane Dembélé’s late double secured a 2-0 win at Anfield as PSG eliminated Liverpool 4-0 on aggregate, with VAR drama and Ekitike’s injury shaping a frustrating European exit for the hosts.
author: OnixWhite

title: Late Luis Díaz dagger sends Bayern past Real Madrid in 7-goal Champions League epic
excerpt: Luis Díaz and Michael Olise struck late as Bayern Munich defeated Real Madrid 4-3 in a chaotic Champions League thriller, overturning momentum after Camavinga’s red card to secure a 6-4 aggregate victory.
author: OnixWhite

title: Atletico Madrid Hold Nerves at Metropolitano Despite Barcelona’s Ferocious 2‑1 Comeback
excerpt: Barcelona fought back from another 2‑0 first‑leg deficit with a 2‑1 win at the Metropolitano, but a VAR‑corrected goal and a late Eric García red card sent Atletico Madrid through 3‑2 on aggregate.
author: OnixWhite

title: Yamal's Fire: Barcelona's Rally Cry Against Atletico's Fortress
excerpt: Lamine Yamal's bold vow meets Hansi Flick's tactical masterplan – can Barcelona shatter Atletico's 2-0 stranglehold in a Champions League thriller?
author: OnixWhite

title: Torres Double Sparks Derby Delight as Barcelona Crush Espanyol 4-1
excerpt: Ferran Torres’ early double and late goals from Yamal and Rashford powered Barcelona to a convincing 4-1 derby win over Espanyol. A strong statement performance as the title race intensifies.
author: OnixWhite

title: Valverde Strikes, Lemar Responds: Real Madrid Held by Resilient Girona in Bernabéu Stalemate
excerpt: Valverde’s thunderbolt gave Real Madrid hope, but Lemar’s swift reply ensured Girona left the Bernabéu with a valuable point. A tense 1-1 draw adds fresh intrigue to the La Liga title race.
author: OnixWhite

title: Red Card, Resistance, and Ruthless Atlético: Barcelona Stunned at Camp Nou
excerpt: From control to collapse, Barcelona’s inefficiency and a crucial red card allowed Atlético Madrid to seize a decisive edge in the Champions League quarter-final.
author: OnixWhite

title: Real Madrid 1-2 Bayern Munich: Kane Strikes as Bayern Snatch First-Leg Advantage at the Bernabéu
excerpt: Harry Kane returned from injury to score and Bayern Munich claimed a crucial 2-1 win at the Bernabéu — their first victory on Real Madrid's turf in 25 years — in the UCL quarter-final first leg.
author: OnixWhite

title: Top 5 Premier League Matches to Watch This Week
excerpt: From a title-deciding six-pointer to a relegation dogfight, this week's Premier League schedule is unmissable. Here are the five games you cannot afford to skip.

title: Champions League 2025-26: Who Can Still Win It?
excerpt: With the quarter-finals set, we break down which clubs have the squad depth, tactical edge, and European pedigree to go all the way.

title: How to Follow Football for Free in 2026
excerpt: You don't need an expensive subscription to stay on top of the beautiful game. Here's our guide to following football for free — legally — in 2026.
